name: estate-email-send
description: Email published blog posts to each estate's subscribers (all estates). Approval-gated (operator clicks Send on a published post; test-to-me option), 2/week per-subscriber cap, dedup, Spam-Act unsubscribe. Reuses Resend + the existing unsubscribe HMAC secret.

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Resend API key. Already present for outreach + transactional sends.

env_vars.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
env_vars.description: Sender override. Defaults to 'Factory2Key <noreply@updates.corporateaisolutions.com>' (the only Resend-verified subdomain).

env_vars.name: HEMP_HOMES_UNSUBSCRIBE_SECRET
env_vars.description: HMAC key for signing unsubscribe tokens. Already present (used by outreach). Reused for all estates.

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CANONICAL_URL
env_vars.description: Canonical app URL, used to build unsubscribe + blog links in emails. Already set.
